events.title: Sticker Boom
events.blurb: +50% stickers per pack for a short window — your dupe pile is about to explode. Post your H:/W: now so you're ready to trade the overflow the second it drops.

events.title: Simpsons Partners event
events.blurb: Partners event is live through the 17th — the best week to lock in a reliable trading partner. Drop your timezone + what you're hunting.

events.title: The Simpsons Album
events.blurb: 21 sticker sets of Simpsons content to chase through July 29 — plenty of dupes flying around. Scan your album to see exactly which ones others want.

events.title: Summer Splash
events.blurb: Summer quest chain running all season — keep your card list current as you grind it.

talkingPoints: Watch for the next Cards Boom in Coin Master — it drops ~50% extra cards, which means a flood of duplicates. The traders who post their H:/W: *before* it hits clear the most.
Gold Card Trade events multiply rare/super-rare trade value 3–5×. If you've got golds you're sitting on, that's the window to move them and finish a set.
Pro tip: scan your whole album once and SwapDeck shows you every player who's missing a card you have spare. Beats scrolling H:/W: lists by hand.
Stuck one card from finishing a set? Post it — someone here almost certainly has it as a dupe collecting dust.
Golden cards are the hardest to move solo. The Trade Chain + group league here exist to match you with the right holder faster.
Trading safely matters: confirm trades in-app so they count toward your stats, your Trade Chain link, and your group's league standing.

smart.t: 🚨 If they ask you to send first, they're not your friend
smart.b:
Classic CM move: 'send me the card and I'll send back, promise 🥺' — then poof, gone.
Swap simultaneously or use a trusted middleman. Trust is earned, not promised in a DM.

smart.t: 🛡️ Trading won't get you banned — here's the actual truth
smart.b:
Card trading is a built-in Coin Master feature. Finding a partner to swap is 100% safe.
Bans come from glitch abuse, bots, or selling cards for real money — never from a normal trade.
(Not affiliated with Moonactive.)

smart.t: 💡 Stop hoarding your duplicates like dragon gold
smart.b:
That stack of 9 duplicate commons? Someone out there needs exactly one to finish a set.
Post your spares EARLY in the event — late traders get desperate, and desperate means generous.

smart.t: ✨ Anyone 'selling' you a gold card is lying. Every time.
smart.b:
If someone offers to 'unlock' a gold card trade for a small fee, it's a scam — no exceptions.
Gold cards are untradeable by design. No app, no trick, no secret method.

event.t: 🎡 Feeling a new card event in the air
event.b:
Spins are charging, villages are waiting. Sort your duplicates and know which cards you're chasing BEFORE it drops.
What's the ONE card that's been haunting your collection? 👇

event.t: ⏳ Don't get caught mid-set when the event hits
event.b:
Organize your spares now so you can send the second trading opens.
Which set are you closest to finishing?

1. Find your missing cards.
2. Find your embarrassing duplicate pile.
3. Make friends here.
That's it. Who still needs their last card to complete a set? 👇

random.t: 🎰 Hot take: a village stops being fun the second you finish it
random.b:
The chase beats the prize. Fight me.
Agree, or am I fully unhinged? 👇

A) Under 100  B) 100–1k  C) 1k+  D) I refuse to answer for legal reasons

random.t: 🃏 POV: you finally get the rare card you needed... as your 4th duplicate
random.b:
Meanwhile the common you've chased for 3 weeks remains a legend nobody has seen.
What card refuses to show up for you?

random.t: 🤔 Would you rather: infinite spins for a day, or every card you need instantly?
random.b:
One ends the grind, one ends the collection.
Pick one and defend it. 👇

smart.t: 🚨 'You go first' is the oldest trick in Board Adventure
smart.b:
If a stranger insists you send your card before they send theirs, just walk away.
Real traders swap together or use a trusted go-between. No exceptions, no excuses.

smart.t: 🛡️ Trading cards is safe — you won't get banned for it
smart.b:
Card trading is an official Board Adventure feature. Meeting partners to swap is fine.
Bans come from bots, glitch abuse, or real-money sales — not from completing a set.
(Not affiliated with Moonactive.)

smart.t: 💡 Trade your doubles BEFORE you hit the wall
smart.b:
Everyone scrambles for the same last card at the end. Get ahead of the panic.
Send your spare commons early, while folks are still feeling generous.

smart.t: ✨ Nobody can 'sell' you a gold card. Ever.
smart.b:
Gold cards are untradeable in Board Adventure — that's literally the whole point.
Anyone charging to 'unlock' one is running a scam. Keep your money.

event.t: 🗺️ A new board's coming — get your trade pile ready
event.b:
Sort your duplicates now so you're not panic-scrolling when the event lands.
Which card has been the bane of your collection? 👇

event.t: ⏳ The early trader catches the rare card

event.t: 🎲 Line 'em up before the next event

random.t: 🎯 Hot take: the rare card always shows up the day AFTER you trade for it
random.b:
At this point it's a law of physics.

random.t: 😬 Confession time: how many unopened chests are you sitting on?

One ends the chase, one ends the suffering.

smart.t: 🚨 'Send the sticker first and I'll send it back' = scam
smart.b:
If someone demands you send before they do, that's the scam talking, not a trade partner.
Swap simultaneously or use a trusted middleman. Don't gift strangers your rares.

smart.t: 🛡️ Trading stickers won't get your account banned
smart.b:
Sticker trading is a real, built-in Monopoly GO event feature. Finding partners is safe.
Bans come from bots, glitches, or selling stickers for cash — not from a normal swap.
(Not affiliated with Scopely.)

smart.t: 💡 Don't sleep on your duplicate stickers
smart.b:
Those spare stars you keep ignoring? Someone needs one to finish their album.
Post them early in the event — last-minute traders are by far the most generous.

smart.t: ✨ Gold stickers can't be sold. Anyone claiming otherwise is scamming
smart.b:
There's no secret app, no fee, no trick to 'unlock' a gold sticker trade.
Keep your money and your account safe — ignore anyone who asks for either.

event.t: 🎩 A sticker event is on the horizon — get your album sorted
